Title: Process tab
Summary: Read only snapshot of what the running server thinks it is.
Body:
## What it shows

Bleepforge version, Node version, platform, PID, port, start time, formatted uptime, data root, asset root, the resolved Godot project root, and the source of that root (preferences vs env vs null).

## Why this exists

The most common debugging path it covers: "wait, is this server actually using the project I think it is?" That confusion happens after editing Preferences and forgetting to restart, or when running multiple checkouts of Bleepforge against different projects.

The tab is informational; it does not bump the diagnostics icon. Refresh button at the top to re check uptime without leaving the page.
